overview: Based on the published agenda, the Administrative Policy Committee of the Village of Kronenwetter was scheduled to conduct organizational business including selection of leadership positions, review meeting minutes, and consider several substantive matters including a fire department grant opportunity, police policy services contract, municipal court fee increase, wage adjustments, and a plan to promote village development.

agenda.item: Committee Duties and Responsibilities - Administrative Policy Committee Responsibilities
Approval of Minutes - April 21, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee Meeting Minutes
Police Policy Contract for Service, CSI Policy Group
RFP Draft for Assessment and Revaluation Services
Developing a Plan to Promote Development Within the Village of Kronenwetter
Consideration of Items for Future Agenda

discussions.item: Approval of Minutes - April 21, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee Meeting Minutes
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and consider approval of the minutes from the April 21, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee meeting. This item was set for discussion and possible action.
The Finance Director was scheduled to present a report to the committee. The specific contents of this report were not detailed on the agenda.
The committee was scheduled to discuss a grant opportunity available through the Department of Natural Resources for the Fire Department. This item was set for discussion and possible action.

discussions.item: Police Policy Contract for Service, CSI Policy Group
discussions.body: The committee was expected to consider a contract for police policy services with CSI Policy Group. This item was set for discussion and possible action.
The committee was scheduled to discuss a proposed increase to municipal court fees. This item was set for discussion and possible action.
The committee was expected to review and consider the HR-005 wage adjustment chart. This item was set for discussion and possible action.

discussions.item: RFP Draft for Assessment and Revaluation Services
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to discuss a draft request for proposals for assessment and revaluation services. This item was set for discussion and possible action.

discussions.item: Developing a Plan to Promote Development Within the Village of Kronenwetter
discussions.body: The committee was expected to consider developing a plan to promote economic or community development within the Village of Kronenwetter. This item was set for discussion and possible action.

publicComment: Public comment was indicated on the agenda, with a 15-minute total time limit and three-minute limit per person, at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion for extensions. No action was scheduled to be taken under public comments.
actionItems: Expected to consider approval of April 21, 2026 meeting minutes
Scheduled to evaluate Fire Department DNR grant opportunity
Expected to consider Police Policy Contract for Service with CSI Policy Group
Scheduled to review and potentially act on Municipal Court fee increase
Expected to consider HR-005 wage adjustment chart
Scheduled to review RFP draft for assessment and revaluation services
Expected to consider developing a plan to promote development within the village
title: Administrative Policy Committee Meeting - 2026-05-19
